allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, CPU; Get-Process -Name redis-server -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, CPU")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{\\"phone\\":\\"13800000001\\",\\"password\\":\\"123456\\",\\"role\\":1}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, Content")
